focus_points.label: Celebrating the payments refactor win.
focus_points.reason: Just shipped the payments refactor, which was a big win and noticed by the team. Worth acknowledging to reinforce their impact and boost morale.

focus_points.label: Motivation and energy levels this week.
focus_points.reason: Looks a bit flat and quieter than usual in standup. Could be post-shipment fatigue, something personal, or just a quieter week — worth exploring.

focus_points.label: Exploring mentoring opportunities.
focus_points.reason: Mentioned they'd like to do more mentoring. Discussing this can align their growth interests with team needs and open new development paths.

focus_points.label: Work in flight and upcoming shifts.
focus_points.reason: Whether they're still on the work that made them senior, or quietly being absorbed into firefighting. This includes upcoming involvement in the billing rewrite.
